artifact.description: HALOS Provenance Spec v0.1 — flat provenance model for recording human-AI collaboration on artifacts

ai_assistance.description: Assisted with schema design, field definitions, and embedding patterns for CycloneDX and SLSA integration

notes: Retroactively created from git history (commit 0932745). Details are best-effort reconstruction. v0.1 established the foundational flat document model: artifact identity, accountable human author, AI assistance disclosure, human review chain, governance policy reference, and artifact lineage. Embedding patterns for CycloneDX and SLSA were defined from the start.
